pi_items.source: task.json metadata field, verified against task description and verifier.py
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE TrackId=1942. Song by Motörhead. Exact match found in official Chinook database.
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE TrackId IN (78, 1854). Multiple versions exist. Song by Metallica. Exact match found in official Chinook database.
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE TrackId=1876. Song by Metallica. Exact match found in official Chinook database.
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE TrackId IN (1212, 1295, 1306, 1367, 1393). Multiple versions exist. Song by Iron Maiden. Exact match found in official Chinook database.
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE TrackId IN (1298, 1318, 1370). Multiple versions exist. Song by Iron Maiden. Exact match found in official Chinook database.

Verified in setup_task.sh and setup_libreoffice_base.sh scripts. This is the working copy location. Source database is downloaded from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database and converted to ODB format.
Installation script (install_libreoffice_base.sh) downloads Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite from lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository. Verified as legitimate public source.

pi_items.verified_value: Real music data from iTunes Library, not synthetic. Database contains 3,503 tracks from 275 artists.
pi_items.source: Official Chinook database documentation states: 'media related data created using real data from an iTunes Library'. Verified by querying actual database.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database containing actual music data from an iTunes Library. All five target tracks exist with exact names as claimed in metadata: 'Ace Of Spades' (Motörhead, TrackId 1942), 'Master Of Puppets' (Metallica, TrackId 1854), 'For Whom The Bell Tolls' (Metallica, TrackId 1876), 'The Number Of The Beast' (Iron Maiden, multiple TrackIds), and 'Run To The Hills' (Iron Maiden, multiple TrackIds). The database contains 3,503 total tracks from 275 artists. The target playlist 'Heavy Classics' does not exist in the initial database and must be created. The database path '/home/ga/chinook.odb' is correctly specified as the working location. All metadata claims have been verified against the actual Chinook SQLite database.
